## Snapshot

- Role: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (freelance / owner at Webtron Future Solutions since 2016).
- Location: Romania; remote-friendly.
- Contact: mihail@subtirelu.info, +40 762 277 372, https://subtirelu.info
- Profiles: GitHub subtirelumihail, LinkedIn /in/subtirelu-mihail-4660836b

## Focus

UI/UX-led React/Next.js work, SaaS and B2B platforms, Node.js, Python, Go, real-time comms, cloud (AWS), healthcare products; automation and LLMs where appropriate.

## Education & languages

Romanian–American University (CS & Management; Law). Nicolae Iorga National College (CS). Romanian native; English C1; French basic.
